lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Greetings! I see you are a new arrival to the world of Gielinor. My job is to welcome all new visitors. So welcome!

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: You have already learned the first thing needed to succeed in this world: talking to other people!

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: You will find many inhabitants of this world have useful things to say to you. By clicking on them you can talk to them.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Before we get going, if you could be so kind to let me know how much experience you have with Old School Runescape, that would be wonderful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've played in the past, but not recently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am brand new! This is my first time here.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Now then, let's start by looking at your options menu.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: You will notice a flashing icon of a spanner. Please click on this to continue the tutorial.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Looks like you're making good progress! The menu you've just opened is one of many. You'll learn about the rest as you progress through the tutorial.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Anyway, I'd say it's time for you to go and meet your first instructor!

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Welcome back. You have already learnt the first thing needed to succeed in this world: talking to other people!

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: You will find many inhabitants of this world have useful things to say to you. By clicking on them, you can talk to them.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: To continue the tutorial go through that door over there and speak to your first instructor!
